title: GitHub - dawndrain/movie-gen: A pipeline for making short movies using Claude Code
excerpt: A pipeline for making short movies using Claude Code - dawndrain/movie-gen
content_html:
movie-gen — AI filmmaking with Higgsfield

A working pipeline for making short films (5–12 minutes, dozens of shots, consistent characters and voices) with Seedance 2.0 (video), Nano Banana Pro (images), Sonilo (music) — all three via Higgsfield's CLI — plus ElevenLabs (voices), Gemini (audio/image QC), and a lot of ffmpeg. About ten films have been made this way; the first complete one, The Long Game (an 11-minute comedy, ~80 shots, ~15 iteration passes), lives in long_game/ as the worked example.

A taste of the output: The Long Game's cast, voices, and start frames, the storyboard, the voice auditions — and the finished film. Two more finished films: Homo Sapien (the music video) and Walter's Deal. There's also a blog post about the whole endeavor: Making AI Movies.

Start with MOVIE_LESSONS.md — the playbook: the pipeline, the laws (retakes regress; after two failed rewordings change what happens; the problem dictates the fix), prompting, voices, sound, and costs. The dated per-project postmortems behind those rules live in PROJECT_LOG.md.

The pipeline in one breath

Anchors (character portraits) → start frames (one per scene, anchors as refs) → cast voices and TTS the script → animatic (the whole film as stills + TTS, ~free — iterate here) → Seedance clips (start frame + anchors + voice refs) → music and ambience as assembler layers → ffmpeg assembly → storyboard.html + preview → director notes → cheapest fix per note → repeat.

Repo map

gen.py            submit Seedance / Nano Banana jobs (handles the 8-job cap)
tools/
  pool_run.py     batch runner; skips finished shots, so re-run = retry
  assemble.py     spec-driven film assembler (cuts, music spans, ambience
                  beds, grades, fades) — see long_game/film_spec.py
  dub_clip.py     replace a line's audio without re-rendering
  pitch_check.py  median-F0 screen for wrong-voice takes
  listen.py       Gemini listens to audio for QC (fault-finding prompts only)
  templates/      best-of-breed per-film tools to copy into a new project:
                  animatic, auditions, ambience, images, storyboard, batch
                  emitter, frame edits, upscale, dub pass
long_game/        the worked example: story, film_spec.py, storyboard_gen,
                  archive/ of every iteration script (media is gitignored)
other_movies/     the other film projects (sagas, Donner Party, Walter's Deal,
                  the Homo Sapien music video, ...). Copyrighted source texts
                  and a few fan-IP projects are local-only via .gitignore.
veo3_compare/     the std-vs-fast blind test harness + prompts

Quickstart for a new film

This repo is built to be driven by Claude Code, not by hand. Your part:

  1. Accounts. A Higgsfield account with credits (Seedance 2.0 and Nano Banana Pro run through their CLI) and an ElevenLabs account for voices. Optional: a Gemini API key for automated audio/image QC.
  2. Run Claude Code in the repo root. It reads the playbook (MOVIE_LESSONS.md) and asks what kind of movie you want to make.
  3. Answer, and stay in the director's chair. Claude installs the tooling, scaffolds the project, and drives the pipeline; the only steps it hands back to you are the browser logins (higgsfield auth login) and pasting your API keys. From there your job is notes on the animatic and previews.

Media (clips, frames, audio, previews) is deliberately not in git — only specs, scripts, and docs. Everything under outputs/ is regenerable from them, credits permitting.

content_html_zh:
movie-gen — 使用 Higgsfield 进行 AI 电影制作

使用 Seedance 2.0（视频）、Nano Banana Pro（图像）、Sonilo（音乐）制作短片（5-12 分钟、数十个镜头、一致的角色和声音）的工作流程（这三者均通过 Higgsfield 的 CLI）以及 ElevenLabs（声音）、Gemini（音频/图像 QC）和大量 ffmpeg。 大约有十部电影都是这样制作的；第一个完整的《The Long Game》（一部 11 分钟的喜剧，约 80 个镜头，约 15 次迭代），以 long_game/ 作为工作示例。

体验一下输出：《漫长的游戏》的演员阵容、配音、起始帧、故事板、配音试镜以及最终的电影。 另外两部完成的电影：《智人》（音乐录影带）和《沃尔特的交易》。 还有一篇关于整个努力的博客文章：制作人工智能电影。

从 MOVIE_LESSONS.md 开始 — 剧本：管道、法律（重新回归；在两次失败的改写后改变发生的情况；问题决定修复）、提示、声音、声音和成本。 这些规则背后的每个项目的事后分析位于 PROJECT_LOG.md 中。

一口气完成管道

锚点（人物肖像）→ 起始帧（每个场景一个，锚点作为参考）→ 演员声音和 TTS 脚本 → 动画（整部电影作为剧照 + TTS，~免费 — 此处迭代）→ Seedance 剪辑（起始帧 + 锚点 + 语音参考）→ 音乐和氛围作为汇编器层 → ffmpeg 汇编 → Storyboard.html + 预览 → 导演注释 → 每个注释最便宜的修复 → 重复。

回购地图

gen.py            submit Seedance / Nano Banana jobs (handles the 8-job cap)
tools/
  pool_run.py     batch runner; skips finished shots, so re-run = retry
  assemble.py     spec-driven film assembler (cuts, music spans, ambience
                  beds, grades, fades) — see long_game/film_spec.py
  dub_clip.py     replace a line's audio without re-rendering
  pitch_check.py  median-F0 screen for wrong-voice takes
  listen.py       Gemini listens to audio for QC (fault-finding prompts only)
  templates/      best-of-breed per-film tools to copy into a new project:
                  animatic, auditions, ambience, images, storyboard, batch
                  emitter, frame edits, upscale, dub pass
long_game/        the worked example: story, film_spec.py, storyboard_gen,
                  archive/ of every iteration script (media is gitignored)
other_movies/     the other film projects (sagas, Donner Party, Walter's Deal,
                  the Homo Sapien music video, ...). Copyrighted source texts
                  and a few fan-IP projects are local-only via .gitignore.
veo3_compare/     the std-vs-fast blind test harness + prompts

新电影快速入门

该存储库是由克劳德代码驱动的，而不是手动驱动的。 你的部分：

  1. 账户。 一个带有积分的 Higgsfield 帐户（Seedance 2.0 和 Nano Banana Pro 通过其 CLI 运行）和一个用于语音的 ElevenLabs 帐户。 可选：用于自动音频/图像质量控制的 Gemini API 密钥。
  2. 在存储库根目录中运行 Claude Code。 它会读取剧本（MOVIE_LESSONS.md）并询问您想制作什么类型的电影。
  3. 回答，然后留在导演椅上。 克劳德安装工具、搭建项目脚手架并驱动管道；它返回给您的唯一步骤是浏览器登录（higgsfield 身份验证登录）和粘贴您的 API 密钥。 从那里你的工作就是对动画和预览进行注释。

媒体（剪辑、帧、音频、预览）故意不在 git 中——只有规范、脚本和文档。 如果学分允许，outputs/下的所有内容都可以从它们中重新生成。
